CREATE TABLE test_neighbor (id Int64, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, neighbor(value, 1) AS next_value FROM test_neighbor;
SELECT id, neighbor(value, -1) AS prev_value FROM test_neighbor;
SELECT id, neighbor(value, 2, -1) AS distant_value FROM test_neighbor;
WITH (SELECT sum(value) FROM test_neighbor) AS total_value SELECT id, neighbor(value, 1) AS next_value, total_value AS summarized_value FROM test_neighbor;
SELECT id, neighbor(value, 2) AS distant_value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_neighbor ORDER BY id) AS ordered_table;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id Int64, ref_value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT a.id, a.value, neighbor(b.ref_value, 1) AS next_ref_value FROM test_neighbor AS a JOIN test_join AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT id, neighbor(value, 3, -999) AS distant_value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_neighbor ORDER BY id DESC) AS ordered_table;
WITH (SELECT id, neighbor(value, 1) FROM test_neighbor) AS neighbors SELECT id, value, neighbor(value, 2, -1) FROM neighbors;
WITH (SELECT id FROM test_neighbor ORDER BY value) AS ordered_id SELECT ordered_id.id, neighbor(value, -5, -1) AS extremely_previous_value FROM test_neighbor;
SELECT id, neighbor(value, 0) AS current_value FROM test_neighbor;
WITH (SELECT id, value FROM test_neighbor WHERE id < 5) AS filtered_table SELECT id, neighbor(value, -1) FROM filtered_table;
SELECT neighbor(value, 2) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_neighbor WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_join)) AS filtered_neighbors;
SELECT id, neighbor(value, 1) AS next_value, neighbor(value, -1) AS prev_value, neighbor(value, 2, 999) AS distant_value FROM test_neighbor ORDER BY id;
